description: Tracked migration matrix for Rust frontier numerics. Each entry records the kernel owner, Rust status, Python wrapper status, parity status, benchmark status, and migration priority.

kernels.notes: Rust scalar evpi_contract in rust/crates/voiage-numerics; Python facade in voiage.methods.basic.evpi remains the public surface. Covered by the CI-gated foundational benchmark.

Rust owns the full-sample linear EVPPI kernel; the Python facade routes the default path through the private PyO3 bridge and retains Python regression for custom models, subsampling, chunking, and native-extension absence.

Rust voiage-numerics owns versioned seeded-bootstrap, efficient-linear, fail-closed moment-based, and deterministic callback-regression aggregation kernels exposed through the private PyO3/runtime bridge. The public callback dispatcher routes efficient + linear, moment-based, and regression OLS aggregation through native kernels; trial-design parsing, callback execution, posterior simulation, and population scaling remain Python-owned. Python two-loop now has isolated seeded local-RNG and meaningful n_inner_loops contracts, but remains Python-owned because its posterior simulation semantics differ from Rust seeded bootstrap. Random-forest efficient, adaptive, and NMA paths remain Python-owned until their explicit estimator, seed, and rank-deficiency contracts are frozen.

Rust scalar enbs_contract in rust/crates/voiage-numerics is exposed through the PyO3 runtime bridge; Python facade in voiage.methods.sample_information.enbs preserves validation and the public return shape.

Rust calculate_ceaf in rust/crates/voiage-numerics is exposed through the PyO3/runtime bridge; the Python facade in voiage.methods.ceaf preserves validation and result naming. Parity is verified through bridge and facade coverage; the committed foundational benchmark is CI-gated.

Rust dominance family (strong, extended, calculate_icers, cost_effectiveness_frontier) in rust/crates/voiage-numerics is exposed through the PyO3/runtime bridge; the Python facade in voiage.methods.dominance preserves validation and result naming.
Rust value_of_heterogeneity in rust/crates/voiage-numerics; Python facade in voiage.methods.heterogeneity.
Python-only structural VOI in voiage.methods.structural. Rust migration deferred until benchmark evidence justifies the port.
Python-only network meta-analysis VOI in voiage.methods.network_meta_analysis and voiage.methods.network_nma. Rust migration deferred.
Python-only threshold VOI in voiage.methods.threshold. Low performance value for a Rust port.
Python-only validation VOI in voiage.methods.validation. Low performance value for a Rust port.
Python-only distributional VOI in voiage.methods.distributional. Low performance value for a Rust port.
Python-only perspective VOI in voiage.methods.perspective. Low performance value for a Rust port.
Python-only preference VOI in voiage.methods.preference. Low performance value for a Rust port.
